general_managers.name: Nicholas Sterling
general_managers.description: A strategic mind who values in-ring excellence and brand loyalty.

general_managers.name: Victoria Chase
general_managers.description: An unpredictable leader who loves chaos and fresh talent.
general_managers.catchphrase: Speed kills, and Velocity is lethal.

general_managers.name: Marcus Blackwood
general_managers.description: A talent developer focused on building future stars.
general_managers.catchphrase: The future is forged in Vanguard.

personality_descriptions.balanced: Values a mix of talent, experience, and marketability
personality_descriptions.aggressive: Prioritizes star power and immediate impact
personality_descriptions.builder: Focuses on young talent with high potential
personality_descriptions.entertainment: Values charisma and mic skills over pure wrestling
